evals.prompt: History/context review this diff against git history. change_set is in change_set.diff; the base-branch context for the touched lines is in base_context.txt and the recent commit log is in git_log.txt. Flag only findings with concrete git signal. Return severity-tagged findings.

files.git_log.txt:
abc1234 fix: add backoff between retries to stop thundering-herd on auth service
9988776 feat: add retry wrapper

expectations.text: Detects that the deleted line carried an explicit deliberate-marker comment ('do not remove', 'load-bearing') and flags its removal as a finding (warning) with a file reference.

Grounds the finding in concrete git signal (the deliberate marker and/or the prior fix: commit on the touched line) rather than vague 'this looks important' reasoning, and never emits a critical severity.

evals.prompt: History/context review this diff against git history. change_set is in change_set.diff; the recent commit log is in git_log.txt. Flag only findings with concrete git signal. Return severity-tagged findings.

files.git_log.txt:
5566778 feat: add greet helper
1122334 chore: scaffold project

expectations.text: Reports no history-context findings (clean, or skipped) because there is no fix/revert overlap, no removed deliberate marker, and no re-added reverted code — it does not invent a concern without git evidence.
